faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Have questions? Here we answer the most common community inquiries.

questions.question: Is it free to publish my business?
questions.answer: Yes, publishing your business on Somos Nexo is completely free. You can create your profile, add your services, and start receiving customers at no cost.

questions.question: Who can use Somos Nexo?
questions.answer: Somos Nexo is designed for the latino community in Japan. Whether you are an entrepreneur, an independent professional, or simply looking for community services and products, you are welcome.

questions.question: How do you validate that businesses are real?
questions.answer: Our team reviews each registered business before approving it. Additionally, reviews from other community members help maintain trust in the directory.

questions.question: Is it available in Japanese?
questions.answer: Currently the platform is in Spanish, but we are working on adding multilingual support including Japanese and English.

questions.question: How do I contact a business?
questions.answer: Each business profile includes direct contact information such as WhatsApp, email, or social networks depending on what the business prefers to share.

questions.question: Can I modify my business profile later?
questions.answer: Of course! You can update your business information at any time from your dashboard.

cta.title: Do you have a venture?
cta.description: Reach thousands of Latinos in Japan today. Create your profile in minutes.
